data.title: Musk’s Starlink enters spotlight as Uganda heads to polls
data.description:
Uganda has placed strict restrictions on Starlink satellite internet technology just weeks before the country’s general elections. Ugandan citizens now require authorization from General Muhoozi Kainerugaba, the Chief of Defence Forces and the son of President Yoweri Museveni, to import Starlink’s technology. The direct-to-satellite internet service that Elon Musk’s SpaceX operates has the antidote to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/starlink-spotlight-uganda-polls/

data.title: ServiceNow Buys Cybersecurity Startup Armis For $7.75Bn

source: https://catenaa.com/industries/technology/servicenow-buys-cybersecurity-startup-armis-for-7-75bn/

data.title: Why This Friday Could Be Very Big For The Bitcoin Price
data.description:
The Bitcoin price could experience major swings this Friday as billions of dollars in options are set to expire. A crypto market expert has warned that the scale of this event could trigger “something big,” potentially affecting both volatility and the actions of retail and institutional investors. source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/this-friday-big-for-bitcoin/
